description_long: This is a sleek, small jet airplane with a streamlined blue fuselage accented by red and white stripes along the wings and tail. The aircraft features a tandem cockpit with a clear, multi-panel canopy, suggesting seating for two or more occupants. Its wings are straight and low-mounted, with a slight dihedral angle and bold red and white striping on the upper surfaces. The tail section is distinctive, with a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both adorned with matching color patterns. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible. The overall design and markings suggest it could be a trainer or aerobatic aircraft, commonly seen in airshows or training environments.
description: A small, blue jet airplane with red and white striped wings and tail, featuring a tandem cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, tandem cockpit, and the left wing with red and white stripes; nose wheel and main gear are visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan with red and white stripes, the streamlined fuselage, and the symmetrical tail design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the right wing and tail, with clear visibility of the cockpit canopy and landing gear.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the dihedral angle of the wings with their colorful stripes.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: tricycle, fixed landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear multi-panel canopy, likely multi-seat.
